popularStory.headline: Introduction
popularStory.description: John Beaufort, 1st Marquess of Somerset and 1st Marquess of Dorset, later only 1st Earl of Somerset, KG (c. 1373 – 16 March 1410) was the first of the four children of John of Gaunt, 1st Duke of Lanca …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset於1373年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易古德特時，他的父親John of Gaunt33歲，母親Katherine de Roet23歲。他於1399年4月23日與Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence在英國英格蘭藍卡爾武普 霍蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1397年登記服兵役。他於1404年被列為lord high constable of england。他去世於1410年3月16日在英國米德萊可普雷可特 本 聖 凱瑟琳享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset于1373年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易古德特时，他的父亲John of Gaunt33岁，母亲Katherine de Roet23岁。他于1399年4月23日与Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence在英国英格兰藍卡爾武普 霍蘭结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1397年登记服兵役。他于1404年被列为lord high constable of england。他去世于1410年3月16日在英国米德萊可普雷可特 本 聖 凱瑟琳享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Beaufort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Beaufort . The surname Beauford is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset was born in 1373, in Goudet, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, John of Gaunt, was 33 and his mother, Katherine de Roet, was 23. He married Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence on 23 April 1399, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1397. In 1404, at the age of 31, his occupation is listed as lord high constable of england. He died on 16 March 1410, in Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset est né en 1373, à Goudet, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, John of Gaunt, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Roet, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence le 23 avril 1399, à Up Holland, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1397. En 1404, à l’âge de 31 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord high constable of england. Il est décédé le 16 mars 1410, à Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset 1373 in Goudet, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater John of Gaunt 33 und seine Mutter Katherine de Roet 23. Er hat am 23. April 1399 in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1397 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1404, als er 31 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord high constable of england aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. März 1410 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, England und wurde in Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset è nato il nel 1373 nel Goudet, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, John of Gaunt, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Katherine de Roet, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence il 23 aprile 1399, nel Up Holland, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1397. Nel 1404, all'età di 31 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord high constable of england. Morì il 16 marzo 1410, nel Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somersetが1373年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-ロイアーゴウデトで生まれた時，父John of Gauntは33歳，母Katherine de Roetは23歳であった。1399年4月23日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドでLady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarenceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1397年に兵役登録をした。1404年，31歳の時，職業はlord high constable of englandと記録されている。彼は1410年3月16日にイギリスミッドレセックスプレシンクト オフ スト カスエリンで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリー カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.lifeSummary: John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset(이)가 1373년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 하테-로이르 고우데트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John of Gaunt(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine de Roet(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1399년 4월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1397년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1404년, 31세의 나이로 그의 직업은 lord high constable of england이었다. 그는 1410년 3월 16일 영국 미들레세스 플레신크트 프 스트 캐더이인에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset nasceu em 1373, em Goudet, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, John of Gaunt, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Roet, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence em 23 de abril de 1399, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1397. Em 1404, com 31 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord high constable of england. Ele faleceu em 16 de março de 1410, em Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.ChÃteau de Beaufort, Maine-et-Loire, Fra: меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Eng: пресинкт оф ст катираин, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset родился в 1373 г. в местности гоудет, хауте-лоир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени John of Gaunt было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Roet, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence 23 апреля 1399 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1397 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1404 году, в возрасте 31 год, работал по профессии lord high constable of england. Он умер 16 марта 1410 г. в местности пресинкт оф ст катираин, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности кантирбури кэтедраль, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset nació en 1373, en Goudet, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, John of Gaunt, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Katherine de Roet, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence el 23 de abril de 1399, en Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1397. En 1404, a la edad de 31 años, su ocupación registrada era lord high constable of england. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1410, en Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Canterbury Cathedral, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
